Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

ISKCON Mayapur land depar. spreading fears and control

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2009-11-03 · 1 answers
The news are that ISKCON Mayapur wants more vaisnavas to go and live there, but when we approach the Holy Dham is an open secret to all that "be careful, only buy land (at high cost) from iskcon land dep. because if u do go buy from some out side local people that they sell much cheaper than iskcon, then u put your self in big danger to have the bengali iskcon "brothers" at your door husel you and threatening you and bringing you to the point that you finally do go away very frustrated with the whole iskcon lack of brotherhood and lack of practical love and trust.

WHY?
user [198] · 2009-11-03
>WHY?

Reason: All problems of the world are because of lack of Krsna Consciousness including this one if it is there.

Solution to Problem: 1.Try to find suggestions&complains box in Mayapur temple. There must be one somewhere, normally it is there outside temple presidents office.
2. If that doesnt resolve, contact temple president
3. If that doesnt work, be humble and write to GBC.

Only if 1,2,3 does not work then jump on to internet. imho, internet should be the last step not the first.
